---
image: img.jpg
title: Comparing virtual reality with computer monitors as rating environments for
  affective dimensions in social interactions
author: Gary J McKeown, Christine Spencer, Alex Patterson, Thomas Creaney, and Damien
  Dupré,
description: International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction
  (ACII 2017)
date: '2017-10-01'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII 2017)

:::
